pi_items.verified_value: Kabul International Airport (commonly referred to as Kabul Airport)
pi_items.source: Wikipedia, FlightRadar24, and aviation databases confirm the airport is officially named Kabul International Airport (IATA: KBL, ICAO: OAKB), with 'Kabul Airport' being a common shorthand

pi_items.verified_value: Historical name used from 2014-2021; current official name as of 2021-2026 is 'Kabul International Airport'
pi_items.source: Wikipedia and aviation databases confirm that Hamid Karzai International Airport was the official name from 2014 to 2021. After Taliban returned to power in 2021, the name was changed back to Kabul International Airport

pi_items.verified_value: Favorites list (or Favorites/Places list in Sygic UI)
pi_items.source: Sygic documentation and user manual confirm the app has a Favorites feature, accessible via Heart icon, displaying a Favorites list of saved locations

privileged_info_summary: The task targets Kabul Airport (officially Kabul International Airport, IATA: KBL), a real major international airport in Afghanistan. The metadata uses 'Hamid Karzai International Airport' as an alternative name, which was the official name from 2014-2021 but was changed back to 'Kabul International Airport' in 2021. Sygic GPS Navigation is a real mobile app with a comprehensive POI database including major airports. The Favorites feature in Sygic allows users to save locations to a Favorites list via a heart icon. The task environment uses Sygic version from APK file dated Feb 15, 2026 (154MB). Data is real-world, not synthetic, sourced from Sygic's actual POI database.
